name: Lemon Squeezy API
what_it_does: SaaS billing and digital product payment platform acting as a Merchant of Record (MoR). Lemon Squeezy handles global tax compliance, VAT/GST collection, and payment processing — creators and indie SaaS developers don't need to set up Stripe Tax or handle international tax obligations. Simpler than Stripe for solo developers and small teams selling digital products or SaaS subscriptions.
use_cases: Sell agent-powered SaaS products with automatic global tax handling without implementing Stripe Tax or VAT compliance
Create subscription billing for AI tools via Lemon Squeezy's checkout and subscription management API
Process digital product sales (templates, datasets, models) with automated license key generation and delivery
Build license validation for AI tools using Lemon Squeezy's license key API for agent-gated feature access
Implement usage-based billing metering via Lemon Squeezy's subscription management API for API-billed agent services
not_for: High-volume enterprise billing requiring complex pricing models — Stripe Billing or Chargebee have more flexibility
Physical product or marketplace selling — Lemon Squeezy is for digital products and SaaS
B2B enterprise sales with purchase orders and invoicing workflows — Paddle or Stripe are more enterprise-capable
best_when: You're an indie developer or small SaaS team that wants simple, tax-compliant global billing without becoming a tax expert or managing Stripe Tax configuration.
avoid_when: You need complex pricing logic, high-volume transaction processing, or enterprise B2B billing features — Stripe or Chargebee provide more control.

auth.notes: API key passed in Authorization Bearer header. Keys generated in Lemon Squeezy account settings. Single key with full API access — no scope granularity.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free to start: 5% + payment processing fees on transactions
pricing.paid_tiers: Plus plan reduces fees: $29/month + 3.5% + processing; unlimited transactions
pricing.notes: Revenue share model (% per transaction) rather than flat monthly fee. Payment processing (Stripe) adds 2.9% + $0.30. Plus plan reduces Lemon Squeezy's cut. MoR model means Lemon Squeezy handles tax compliance.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits not publicly specified; standard API rate limiting applies

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Standard REST JSON errors with HTTP status codes. Webhook payloads are well-documented. API documentation is clean and comprehensive for the platform's complexity.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Checkout creation is not idempotent — creates new checkout sessions. Order and subscription queries are idempotent. Agents should avoid recreating checkouts for the same purchase intent.
known_agent_gotchas: As Merchant of Record, Lemon Squeezy's refund and dispute policies apply — agents building agent services must understand MoR implications
Webhook signature validation is required — use the provided HMAC signature to validate webhook authenticity before processing
License key validation API is separate from the main API — agents implementing license gating must use the specific license validation endpoint
Checkout URLs expire and are single-use — agents must create new checkout URLs for each purchase attempt
Currency handling: Lemon Squeezy converts to buyer's local currency automatically — pricing in USD is converted at checkout

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. PCI-DSS compliant (payment processing delegated to Stripe). GDPR compliant as MoR. Webhook signatures prevent forgery. Single API key with no scope granularity.
